0.8.3.title: SlickBot v0.8.3
0.8.3.summary: Improves Join-to-Create user controls with native Discord user select menus.
notes: Replaced typed-user modals for Permit User, Remove User, and Transfer Ownership with Discord user select menus.
Members can now search and select users through Discord's native picker instead of typing full usernames, mentions, or IDs.
Rename, Set Limit, and Delete Channel confirmation continue using modals because those controls need typed values.
Temporary voice control panels still refresh after selected-user actions so access and ownership changes stay current.

0.8.2.title: SlickBot v0.8.2
0.8.2.summary: Polishes Join-to-Create voice control panels with lock status emojis and modal-based owner controls.
notes: Added lock and unlock emojis to the Join-to-Create control panel buttons.
Updated the temporary voice status field to show 🔒 Locked or 🔓 Unlocked.
Added button-driven modals for Rename, Set Limit, Permit User, Remove User, and Transfer Ownership so members can adjust rooms without memorizing slash commands.
Changed Delete Channel from an immediate action to a confirmation modal that requires typing DELETE.
Control panels continue to refresh after owner actions so status, owner, and limit details stay current.

0.8.1.title: SlickBot v0.8.1
0.8.1.summary: Adds automatic temporary voice control panels with owner pings and quick buttons for Join-to-Create rooms.
notes: Temporary voice channels now receive an automatic control panel message in the voice channel chat when created.
The control panel pings the temporary channel owner so they can quickly find the controls.
Added quick buttons for Lock, Unlock, Claim, and Delete Channel.
The control panel shows owner, lock status, user limit, available slash commands, and auto-cleanup behavior.
The control panel updates after owner actions such as rename, limit changes, locking, unlocking, ownership transfer, and claiming.
SlickBot records control panel message IDs and logs a clear error when it cannot post the panel due to channel or permission limitations.

0.8.0.title: SlickBot v0.8.0
0.8.0.summary: Adds the Join-to-Create Voice module for temporary voice rooms with owner controls and automatic cleanup.
notes: Added the Join-to-Create Voice module as a completed implemented module.
Staff can register an existing voice channel as a join-to-create hub or create a new hub channel through Discord commands.
When a member joins a configured hub, SlickBot creates a temporary voice channel, moves the member into it, and tracks ownership in PostgreSQL.
Temporary voice channels support owner controls for rename, user limit, lock, unlock, permit, remove, transfer, and claim.
Empty temporary voice channels are automatically cleaned up after the configured delay, with startup repair for tracked channels after restarts.
Added join-to-create database storage, diagnostics, module status, permissions, and logging events.

0.7.0.title: SlickBot v0.7.0
0.7.0.summary: Adds the Custom Commands module for staff-managed text and embed responses triggered by members in chat.
notes: Added the Custom Commands module as a completed implemented module.
Staff can create, edit, delete, enable, disable, view, list, and test custom commands through Discord slash commands.
Members can trigger enabled custom commands with the configured prefix, such as !rules.
Custom command responses support plain text or embed mode, including optional embed title and color.
Added per-command cooldowns plus optional channel and role restrictions.
Added custom command database storage, usage tracking, diagnostics, module status, permissions, and logging events.

0.6.7.title: SlickBot v0.6.7
0.6.7.summary: Refines server stats so voice counters update from voice events while the interval refresh remains a backup.
notes: Updated voice-state handling so joining, leaving, or moving voice channels queues a near-immediate voice counter refresh.
Added a separate follow-up verification pass after voice changes so configured counters can be checked without delaying the voice counter.
Changed the periodic server stats fallback refresh from 5 minutes back to 15 minutes.
Improved voice counting by comparing voice-state cache and voice-channel member cache for a more reliable in-voice total.

0.6.6.title: SlickBot v0.6.6
0.6.6.summary: Adds the Bot Updates module and improves server stats reliability for member and voice counters.
notes: Added the Bot Updates module for configured release announcements with patch notes.
Added update-channel setup and optional role pings for bot update announcements.
Added preview and manual send tools for bot update messages.
Improved server stats refresh behavior with debounced event updates and clearer rename failure reporting.
Reduced unnecessary full member fetches during voice-state updates so voice counters can update more consistently.
